set deadlock_priority 10DECLARE @LangID AS smallint SELECT @LangID=langid FROM syslanguages WHERE lcid=%ld IF (@LangID IS NULL) BEGIN 	RAISERROR(15127, 20, -1) WITH LOG END EXEC sp_configure N'default language', @LangID EXEC sp_configure N'default full-text language', %ld
set deadlock_priority 10EXEC sp_configure N'show advanced options', %ld
ALTER DATABASE tempdb ADD FILE (NAME = N'tempdev%d', FILENAME = N'%s', SIZE = 8MB, FILEGROWTH = 64MB)

set deadlock_priority 10
DECLARE @cmd1 nvarchar(max)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.server_principals WHERE name = N'NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM')
BEGIN
	SELECT @cmd1 = 'CREATE LOGIN [NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM] FROM WINDOWS'
	EXEC (@cmd1)

	EXEC sys.sp_dropsrvrolemember N'NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM', N'sysadmin'
END

set deadlock_priority 10
DECLARE @cmd1 nvarchar(max)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.server_principals WHERE name = N'NT AUTHORITY\NETWORK SERVICE')
BEGIN
	SELECT @cmd1 = 'CREATE LOGIN [NT AUTHORITY\NETWORK SERVICE] FROM WINDOWS'
	EXEC (@cmd1)
	EXEC sys.sp_addsrvrolemember @loginame=N'NT AUTHORITY\NETWORK SERVICE', @rolename=N'sysadmin'
END
